pre_expr: fun s => 0 < amount ∧ getBalance s r sender ≥ amount
intent: Bridge L2 → L1 withdrawal (Workstream C / Genesis Plan §7.4): debit `amount` units of resource `r` from `sender`'s balance and schedule an L1 redemption to `_recipientL1`.  Kernel-level effect is `burn`-shaped balance decrement (gated by sufficient-balance precondition).
impl_block:
fun s => setBalance s r sender (getBalance s r sender - amount)
  -- Per plan §19.4 LX.26: `withdraw` is `burn`-style: claims
  -- `local`, `freeze_preserving`, `nonce_advances`,
  -- `registry_preserving`.  NOT `conservative` AND NOT
  -- `monotonic` (subtractive — supply decreases by `amount`).
